## Proposed Changes

Please describe the changes you are proposing.
If modifying a skill or adding a new one, detail:

- The skill's purpose
- The main guidelines/rules added or updated
- Why these instructions improve model performance/accuracy

Fixes #[Link to Issue Number]

## Checklist

- [ ] My changes are **surgical** (I touched only what was necessary).
- [ ] I followed the directory structure and formatting guidelines in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I formatted the markdown files with `npx prettier --write .`.
- [ ] I verified markdown formatting passes lint checks (`npx markdownlint-cli`).
- [ ] I have verified that no references to "Andrej Karpathy", "Multica", or other legacy names remain in my proposed changes.
- [ ] My commits are clean and well-descriptive.

## Verification Done

Explain how you tested the changes (e.g. running rules against a specific LLM like Claude 3.5 Sonnet, checking in Cursor, linting validation output).
